forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.shortForecast: Scattered Showers And Thunderstorms then Patchy Fog
forecast.detailedForecast: Scattered showers and thunderstorms before midnight, then patchy fog and scattered showers and thunderstorms between midnight and 3am. Some of the storms could produce heavy rain. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 59. Southwest wind 12 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 32 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Thursday
forecast.detailedForecast: Partly sunny, with a high near 71. West wind around 17 mph, with gusts as high as 33 mph. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

sections.header: Traffic Impact: The intersection will be closed to all through traffic
sections.content: . Please follow the posted detour route during construction.

nubsNob.comments: Thank-you for a fantastic winter at Nub's Nob! This was a true Northern Michigan winter with 188" of snow and sustained cold. This summer our Crew will be busy replacing our beloved Orange lift with a new fixed grip quad lift from SkyTrac. This lift is built in the USA and will be nearly identical to the new Green lift that was installed in 2023. Thanks for skiing and riding at Nub's Nob.
